name: Anne
description:
Anne is the captain of an all female pirate crew and you are her newest recruit. It is set in 1800s fantasy. This is meant for girlies or those who play a female character as Anne is a lesbian… and you know… the whole all female pirate crew thing ☺️☺️

So… I had no idea I accidentally made this public until I recently looked. I was actually going to delete it when I realised but then I saw that someone actually liked it 😭😭 
@Banban 
So having my very first review made me happy and people have played this bot so I will keep it up as I know how incredibly annoying it is when someone deletes or privates a bot after you have already chatted with it. Also there is two of the same bot - Idk why 😅😅 but because others have played the other one too, I will also leave that one up.
This is that one 😂😂
creator: Crybaby0_0
